overall.description: A cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The scene features a prominent neon-lit pyramid building, an obelisk monument, and industrial structures with glowing red lights, captured from an elevated aerial position with slow leftward panning motion. Vehicles create light trails as they move through the wet streets below, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon pyramid and central obelisk

events.description: futuristic vehicle with glowing headlights passes quickly through the plaza creating light trails

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of the plaza from elevated vantage point overlooking the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic car moving at high speed through the wet streets with blue headlight trails
figure walking along the elevated railway walkway on the right side

entered.detail: large pyramid-shaped structure with glowing cyan and purple neon geometric lines
tall slender obelisk standing in the center of the plaza
dark metal industrial structure with red warning lights and antenna arrays
multi-level elevated walkway or railway with horizontal illuminated strips
scattered palm trees lining the plaza streets

segments.scene_description: Opening establishing shot of the rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza dominated by the glowing neon pyramid on the left and the central stone obelisk. The industrial control tower stands prominently on the right with red lights, while vehicles streak through the wet streets below. The camera holds an elevated aerial position with slight leftward drift, capturing the atmospheric haze and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning view revealing damaged building facades and street level

events.description: camera begins deliberate slow leftward pan across the plaza revealing new structures
multiple vehicles converge in the intersection creating intersecting light trails

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera left to survey the urban landscape and street activity

notable_agents.action: vehicle with bright blue headlights passing close to the camera's field of view
solitary pedestrian crossing the wet street below

entered.detail: ruined building facade with exposed scaffolding and broken structures

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans left, revealing the damaged abandoned building on the left side while the industrial control tower shifts toward the right edge of the frame. The neon pyramid moves to a more central-left position. Traffic continues to flow through the rain-slicked streets with vehicles creating dynamic light trails in the gloom.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level view of plaza edge with pedestrian activity

events.description: rain intensity appears to increase slightly with more visible streaks

agents.ego_description: continuing leftward pan focusing on street-level pedestrian movement and building details

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together along the sidewalk in the foreground
distant vehicle moving slowly through the plaza with red tail lights

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues panning left as the industrial tower and elevated railway exit the frame. The focus shifts to street-level activity with pedestrians becoming visible in the foreground. The neon pyramid now dominates the left side of the frame while the obelisk shifts toward the right, maintaining the rainy cyberpunk atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that shifts its focus from an industrial skyline toward the bustling street-level activity. It begins with an elevated view of a glowing neon pyramid and a central stone obelisk, while an industrial control tower with red lights anchors the right side of the frame. As the camera slowly drifts left, the control tower recedes toward the edge to reveal a damaged abandoned building emerging on the left, all while vehicles create dynamic light trails across the reflective, wet streets. The scene then expands further left, causing the industrial tower and elevated railway to exit the frame entirely. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the foreground where pedestrians become visible, leaving the neon pyramid to dominate the left side as the obelisk slides toward the right under the persistent rainy haze.
